chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S- 176 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution. 24.07.2025. Mr. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ------------ None present for the petitioners. No intimation is received. Today the matter is fixed for non-prosecution as the Petitioner as well as his counsel did not provided copies of the memo of petition along with annexures, cost has also not been deposited. Same was the position on the last date of hearing i.e. 11.7.2025 when neither petitonier nor his Counsel was in attendance. Such conduct on the part of Petitioner and his Counsel reflects that either the grievance of the Petitioner has been redressed or the Petitioner has lost interest to pursue the matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
